patterns.adapter_signature: All adapters use: def main [workdir: string, prompt_file: string, stdout_log: string, stderr_log: string, _memory_out?: string, --test]
patterns.path_handling: Resolve relative paths to absolute before cd into workdir
patterns.self_tests: All adapters have --test flag that runs internal validation using std/assert
patterns.prerequisite_checks: Adapters check prerequisites and fail gracefully with clear error messages

existing_implementations.description: Found 8 existing adapters (claude, ollama, codex, aider, goose, opencode, mock, timeout_wrapper) all following consistent patterns

zam.note: Adapter should fail gracefully until zam is available

dub.note: UEFI bootloader for secure boot (future enhancement)

vm_architecture.virtfs_9p: Mount card bundle into VM via -virtfs local,path=<workdir>,mount_tag=card
vm_architecture.serial_output: VM output via -serial file:<stdout_log> to capture UART
vm_architecture.kernel_direct: Direct kernel boot with -kernel <zam_image> (no full UEFI yet)
